options.name: --preset
options.description: What to create in a new workspace (options: "empty", "npm", "web-components", "angular", "angular-nest", "react", "react-express", "react-native", "next", "gatsby", "nest", "express")

options.name: --appName
options.description: The name of the application created by some presets

options.name: --cli
options.description: CLI to power the Nx workspace (options: "nx", "angular")

options.name: --style
options.description: Default style option to be used when a non-empty preset is selected options: ("css", "scss", "less") plus ("styl") for all non-Angular and ("styled-components", "@emotion/styled", "styled-jsx") for React, Next.js, Gatsby

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Enable interactive mode when using presets (boolean)

name: --packageManager
--pm
options.description: Package manager to use (npm, yarn, pnpm)
